text: You don't have to feel good about it.
You just have to keep going. The feeling
will pass, but you will remain. You are
greater than your feelings. Going to bed
late and waking up early to work for a
few days won't kill you. You're not
going to burn out. You're doing what it
takes. If you're one of those people
that push work life balance, just
remember the people who like working a
lot don't care. I've never regretted
trying harder at anything ever. Hard
times last long, but an epic story feels
like a lifetime.

And because of that, you're prepared to

So the idea that working hard doesn't

at the end of the day whatever you
amount to isn't going to matter anyways,

And that means that even if the thing

And so, I'll give you a very real
example. So, I spent 5 years building a
chain of gyms. So I had six locations
and after that I sold five of them. I
shut one down and then I transitioned to
doing turnarounds.
In the transition between shutting my

I took all that money and I put it into

I kept doubling down and then I get my

5 years of work.
But then in the next 12 months I made

which is that
the thing that was the outcome of those

than you
than you think you can. And so
that's why since that moment where I

I am the output of the work, not the

that work is wasted because the more I

an exercise example because I think it's
it's cool and interesting is that a lot
of people talk about this concept of

was talk I had this a woman that uh
Leila and I are friends with very

And if you don't get injured and you
